overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic urban street in Night City. The player walks along wet sidewalks past palm trees and commercial buildings toward a large stadium with distinctive purple neon lighting, with the downtown skyline visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with stadium approach

events.description: vehicle with headlights passes by on the left side of the street
approaching intersection with traffic lights changing from green to red

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the right sidewalk toward the illuminated stadium structure ahead

notable_agents.action: car driving along the street with headlights on, passing from right to left

entered.detail: large dome-shaped stadium structure with distinctive purple and pink neon lighting patterns
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk with textured trunks
low-rise commercial structures with illuminated windows and signage
tall street lamps casting warm light on the wet pavement
utility poles and overhead power lines crisscrossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a wet concrete sidewalk at night. The massive stadium with purple neon lights dominates the distant view ahead, while palm trees and commercial buildings line the street. A car passes by on the road as the player approaches an intersection with traffic lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with circular billboard plaza

events.description: turns left at the intersection, changing direction toward the downtown skyline
crosses the street and transitions to the opposite sidewalk with stadium now on the right

agents.ego_description: navigating the intersection, turning left and crossing the street while observing the circular billboard structure

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving through the intersection with headlights illuminated

entered.detail: tall cylindrical structure with multiple digital advertisement screens rotating
tall futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows forming the city skyline

segments.scene_description: The player navigates a wide urban intersection, turning left to cross the street. A prominent circular billboard structure with rotating advertisements comes into view on the left. The stadium shifts to the right side of the frame as the downtown skyline with tall skyscrapers becomes visible ahead. Vehicles continue to pass through the intersection.

events.description: white van drives past on the street heading in the opposite direction
slight turn to the right as the path curves toward the stadium entrance area

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk with the stadium visible on the right side, heading toward the downtown area

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: tall vertical digital screen displaying animated advertisements with neon colors

segments.scene_description: Walking along the sidewalk with the stadium now prominent on the right, the player moves through a commercial area with various storefronts. A large vertical digital billboard displays animated ads on the left. The downtown skyscrapers fade from view as the path curves back toward the stadium entrance. Occasional pedestrians and vehicles are visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: stadium plaza entrance with heavy neon lighting

events.description: crowd density increases as approaching the stadium entrance plaza
purple neon lighting from the stadium becomes dominant, casting colored light on surroundings

agents.ego_description: approaching the stadium entrance while observing the neon-lit structure and surrounding pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt and blue pants walking along the sidewalk
person in dark clothing walking toward the stadium entrance

entered.detail: entrance plaza to the stadium with stairs and illuminated archway

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the stadium entrance plaza, where the purple neon lighting becomes intense and dominant. More pedestrians are visible walking toward and around the entrance. The large digital billboard remains visible on the left. The atmosphere shifts to a more crowded, event-like setting near the stadium structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a rain-slicked urban street that shifts from a focused approach toward a neon stadium to a wide view of the downtown skyline. It begins with a walk along a wet concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees and commercial buildings, while a massive stadium glowing with purple neon dominates the distant horizon. As the camera reaches a busy intersection and a car passes by, the perspective turns left to cross the street, bringing a prominent circular billboard with rotating advertisements into view. The scene then expands as the stadium shifts to the right of the frame, opening up the vista to reveal towering skyscrapers and the sprawling city skyline ahead.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a commercial urban district that gradually converges into the vibrant, crowded plaza of a neon-lit stadium. It begins with a walk along a wet sidewalk past various storefronts, where a large vertical digital billboard displays animated ads on the left. As the path curves, the distant downtown skyscrapers fade from view, shifting the focus toward the stadium structure becoming prominent on the right. The scene then opens into the entrance plaza, where the ambient city light is overtaken by intense, dominant purple neon. Finally, the atmosphere transforms into a bustling event-like setting as the camera moves among an increasing number of pedestrians gathered near the stadium entrance.
